column1: # live_dump_manifest.tsv — VPS operational-CSV staleness manifest (S-2026-07-02)
# The live VPS binary writes load-bearing operational CSVs to C:\Omega\logs via
# set_live_dump(). NONE are pulled to the Mac, and the Mac-side feeds self-test
# structurally cannot see them — so a VPS writer can die and every Mac freshness
# banner stays GREEN. This manifest is the single source of truth for WHICH live
# dumps are cadence-monitorable and their max age; tools/feeds_selftest.py polls
# the VPS (one `ssh omega-vps` batched call) against it, and the build-gate
# tools/live_dump_freshness_audit.sh fails if a NEW set_live_dump() path is not
# listed here (so an unmonitored live dump cannot be committed).
# ONLY deterministic-cadence dumps belong here. Event-driven files
# (omega_trade_closes.csv / tod / fill / day_results) have NO fixed cadence and
# are therefore NOT cadence-monitorable — excluded BY DESIGN.
# Columns (tab-separated):  path_under_logs  max_age_min  description
gold_regime_h1.csv
gold_d1_trend_h4.csv
index_mkt_regime_h1.csv

macro/macro_gold_gate.tsv
